title: Drain or close lora_sim socket on oversized frame
description: Trigger: the simulator sends a length-prefixed frame larger than the local response buffer. lichen/drivers/lora/lora_sim.c:120 returns -ENOMEM without consuming the oversized frame payload or closing the socket. Impact: the TCP stream remains desynchronized, so subsequent simulator operations read leftover bytes as frame headers and fail unpredictably. Drain the frame safely or close/reconnect the simulator socket on oversize.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
